title: Debug a 3-layer LV + Task + on_mount sandbox ordering failure
prompt: Write `docs/three_layer_lv_debug.md` diagnosing: a LiveView test fails with `DBConnection.OwnershipError` but only when the user's `on_mount({UserAuth, :mount_current_user})` hook runs BEFORE `on_mount({UserAuth, :sandbox})`. The auth hook queries `Accounts.get_user/1` which fails because the sandbox allowance hasn't been set up yet. Must explain: (1) on_mount hooks run in the declared order, (2) the auth hook queries Repo before the sandbox hook grants allowance, (3) fix: swap the order so sandbox comes first, (4) provide the corrected router.ex snippet: `on_mount: [{UserAuth, :sandbox}, {UserAuth, :mount_current_user}]`.
tier_rationale: Ordering bug diagnosis with specific router fix.
research_citation: "If you have other `on_mount` hooks in `live_session` defined in your router (such as authentication hooks), make sure the sandbox acceptance hook runs first" — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
